title: pulmonaria angustifolia var. oblongata
intro: Pulmonaria angustifolia var. oblongata, also known as Lungwort, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help soothe respiratory issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Lungwort include reduced inflammation, improved respiratory function, and enhanced immune system response, making it a popular natural remedy for coughs, colds, and bronchitis. Lungwort can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, and has also been used in traditional herbal medicine for its expectorant and antiseptic properties.
